The '''Battle of Half-Axe Pass''' was a battle that took place on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]] as part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Cleansing of New Plympto|campaign]] to [[Death/Legends|kill]] the planet's [[Nosaurian/Legends|Nosaurian]] population. During the battle, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Dass Jennir]] aided the [[New Plympto resistance (Imperial Period)|New Plympto resistance]], fighting alongside his friend [[Bomo Greenbark]], one of the Nosaurians. The pair were the only members of the resistance to survive the battle, as the other Nosaurians were killed in the fighting or executed after surrendering.
